title: Minimum Operations to Make Array Equal
statement:
Given an array of integers where all elements have the same sum divisible by n (so a valid integer target exists), find the minimum number of operations to make all elements equal. In one operation you pick two elements, increment one and decrement the other.

**Input:** Space-separated integers.
**Output:** Print the minimum number of operations.
constraints:
- 1 ≤ arr.length ≤ 10⁵
- 0 ≤ arr[i] ≤ 10⁴
- Sum of array is divisible by array length.

examples.explanation: Target=2. Move 1 from 3 to 1. One operation.
